name: Qantas Airways Limited
message: [AI generated] Qantas Airways Limited is an Australian international and domestic airline service. Founded in 1920, it is the third oldest airline in the world. Qantas is recognized for its commitment to safety, operational reliability, and customer service. The Qantas Group includes Qantas Domestic, Qantas International, Jetstar, and Qantas Loyalty, as they serve customers across various divisions.
